case_title: PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY VS YELLOW CAB CO-OP

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $511.24 FILED BY PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT YELLOW CAB CO-OP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-03-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00
